user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-09 15:56 EST
Subject: partner engagement - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-01-11 11:55 EST
Subject: Re: Re: partner engagement Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with partner engagement. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery
Date: 2024-02-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:07:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:11:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

[00:14:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:19:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:28:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:31:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:35:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:39:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:42:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.
